qa_pair.question: Using only the Topos MCP server's tool surface, how many tools does it expose? Return the integer only.
What is the URI of the Topos documentation resource that explains the diamond lattice? Return the full URI.
According to the Topos metrics reference (topos://docs/metrics), what is the numeric threshold (between 0 and 1) for achieving a lattice target on either dimension? Return the number only.
In the Topos priority profile named "composable", what is the weight on coupling metrics (w_coupling)? Return the number only.
What assessment status does topos_assess_improvement return when scores move meaningfully but the AST edit distance is near zero (anti-gaming guardrail)? Return the exact status string.
Which Topos evaluation dimension (structural or coupling) is unreachable without providing a DependencyGraph / gitnexus_dir? Return one word.
What Unicode symbol represents the SOUND lattice element in Topos? Return the single character.
Using topos_compare_files to compare src/topos/main.py against itself, what is the normalized_distance? Return the number only.
Using topos_inspect_code on the contents of src/topos/main.py, which function has the highest cyclomatic complexity? Return the function name only.

According to topos://docs/workflows, the canonical Topos refactor loop has four stages before the decision step. Name them in order, separated by " → ". Return the exact four-word sequence as shown in the document.
